description:
Convert 2 functions to single-line do: syntax

1. start_link/1 (line 61-63):
```elixir
def start_link(opts), do: GenServer.start_link(__MODULE__, opts, name: Keyword.get(opts, :name, __MODULE__))
```

2. process_pending/1 guard clause (line 124-126):
```elixir
defp process_pending(%{pending_queues: queues} = state) when map_size(queues) == 0, do: state
```

File: apps/bedrock_job_queue/lib/bedrock/job_queue/consumer/manager.ex
title: Convert manager.ex to do: syntax
